---
ID: US-OLV-047
Title: Search HR records
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-19
Milestone: Hub and module architecture

As a HR operator
I want a global search modal across candidates, employees, and devices
So that I can jump to the right page without browsing manually

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The HR module exposes a search modal with grouped results.
- [ ] Selecting a result navigates to the page that owns that record type.

Notes: Implemented in `GlobalSearch`; I did not validate search quality on real datasets.
---
